description: Legal document dealing with a debt of Hiba/Natan the dyer b.'Ulla to al-Sheikh Abu 'Ali Yefet b. David for two qintar of indigo he bought from him for 1000 dirhams and which he agrees to repay by the month of Nisan of the same year. Dated 7 Tevet 1541 Seleucid which is 1229-1230.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
